Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-19 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Long-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns from 1 month to 10 years, with relative performance vs SPY over 1y/5y/10y. Same scoring engine as the short-term ranker but optimized for longer investment horizons and secular trends.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker-long Today's data reveals two exceptionally strong performers at the top of the long-term momentum rankings. LINC ranks #1 with a score of 95.4, showing remarkable consistency across all time horizons with 1,354% returns over 10 years and a "strong_buy" signal, supported by all four moving average tests passing and a clean momentum flag. FUWAY follows closely behind, posting even more extreme short-term momentum with a 193.5% three-month return and 282.8% one-year return, though its 10-year performance (876.7%) trails LINC significantly. Both tickers maintain perfect positioning above their 30/50/100/200-day moving averages and substantially outperform SPY across all measured timeframes (FUWAY by 265% over 1 year versus SPY). The key distinction is that LINC demonstrates steadier multi-decade growth with passing momentum ratios across all periods, while FUWAY shows more concentrated recent outperformance with a notable deceleration signal (6.65x ratio from 1m to 3m, but only 0.94x from 6m to 3m).
